Last edit over 5 years ago by Harpax

151
All we need add to this insight is to realize that we are animals ourselves; to Him there is no distinction, since it is the world (of life) which He loves. Since death is always unjust, then it follows that it must be that only God dies, each time a creature dies; it is always He lying there in the shrubs gasping and glassy eyed His mouth frozen half-open and dumb. Pinky, Ralph -- always, always, always; He is there to receive the blow...the dying creature (especially the wise dumb animal types) probably experience it as a natural flowing or moving toward God as their physical shells decline and perish; so that rather than experiencing God coming into them, or becoming God, they sense themselves approaching God and God's realm (Kingdom). They go. But were we to see unblinded, we would see Him appear. Here. I think the message is: Whenever you kill (or injure, by extension) you kill something blameless.

I even used the term "destroying angel," which is used in Hebrews about that episode before the Exodus at which time Passover was established!

Exodus 12:13: Jehova: "And the blood must serve as your sign upon the houses where you are; and I must see the blood and pass over you, and the plague will not come on you as a ruination, when I strike at the land of Egypt," i.e. when he came as the destroying angel, the angel of death, and slew the first born; and so began Passover; and thus I experienced it that night in the bedroom, that Sunday (sic!) night, when the pale white light which cast no shadow, where there was no plce to hide, came on, and I knew then that the angel of death had come; and I prayed my head off frantically for hours in terror; and that night in sleep I dreamed of a gun being fired and a deer-like animal wounded in a ditch, a woman; and a few days later Pinky (the little pink sheep) died of cancer. The angel passed over (me, us except that he took Pinky, the lamb-sacrifice). 14: "And this day must serve as a memorial for you, and you must celebrate it as a festival to Jahweh throughout your generations." Later we are to say when someone asks the meaning of the festival of Passover: "It is the sacrifice of the passover to Jahweh, who passed over the houses of the sons of Israel in Egypt when he plagued the Egyptians, but he delivered our houses." (27).

8 in reading in psych today about all the varies") types of meditation I can see that, if any, it was kundaling yoga that I experienced - sp. the opering of the 5th chakra. Visions gets, but the most startling, viz : "the person may assume positions from classic dances." I immediately realized that the dance positions I had seen the "corn King" dancing I had at some previous time seen statue-representations of Hindu Gods frozen in I believe vishnu, but which Gods it doesn't matter. This would fit in with the 3rd eye, with the dream of the phone call Elisha Hore-Belisha in India, the woven fiber wrapped jug. + the sandskrit words in leg. + the phosphenes as the "Kundalini fire 19 o 6 I I can't draw it, like the Jester on the playing card. All the way back to classical india. Then K.W. showed me the ad for the "on generator to be placed in the 3rd eye position to in crease ESt," to stimulate the pineal gland. -Pythagoras got his ideas in india. Also, the God I saw is imma nent + ubiquitous like Brahman - "tat tvam asi" etc., with myself remembering a former life, + my origins + purpose (goal in rising successively to at last escape from here - i.e. from the wheel). of any "known" God, Zebra is most like Brahman, + cer tainly not the theistic, transcendent Jewish - Christian God. In This once -again Brahmanistic viow, I saw the identity between my Atmen within + Brahman outside + all around me more than even that my anamnesis seemed to make me (at least temporarily) able to identify myself as something like an avatar who had come down here + forgotten - i.e. it would cause me to view myself as one of the immortal race from ancient times (+ think to myself, this is what the Rosi grucians knew; this is the ancient secret knowledge.) This is what maya has caused us to forget inwardly - + what I saw outwardly is that which is hidden (out there] by maya

6 Harvey's fall had a purpose which soon became evident: it made it impossible - not just difficultfor me to continue to see Joan. His fall + faithful waiting probably changed the course of my life + for the better. It combined with other events to absolute prohibit any more trips north. Remembering what I saw in 3-74 I can see God's handiwork -his typical method-in this. Intrinsically, the cat's fall was tragic - until the consequences are perceived. + these consequences (results) are in them. selves, only stages (means) to greater, further consequences; + so the cosmos builds before our very eyes. Suddenly I just realized a profound implication of the above. We - each, all of us -- must be preprogrammed to play out specific roles (Acts + actions) most or all of our lives; we are not autonomous. but programmed into a complex matrix structure. The future is just as rigidly frozen (fixed) as the past. Under normal circumstances we are totally reified - like a pile of bricks (without any awareness of this rigid determinism - except in dejavu). However, our role (response, action) can be overridden, cancelled, nullified - but then another sequence of actions, just as commanding, just as binding, would replace it we'd be (on‐ not free will but a better "instinct." +

scious of this override reprogramming: we'd be aware of its totally controlling nature. + we'd be aware of the cancelled programming- we'd know about both - the new one + the discarded, nullified one. + so we'd see the real situation we're in. This is what happened to me on 3-74; not only was my programming (script) obliterated + a better one inserted in its place (which saved my life) but I got to see all reality as it really is.

11 that which is not-God will be destroyed + we, who are fragments of him, will resume life as members of him. This is the task Christ has accepted. As judge, he determines + N What will be divinized hence reabsorbed; ( iter‐ what will be "burned" or destroyed. The crin ihere is more an intellectual one of that which is real (part of God +/or isomorphic to him) + that which is not. The divine cosmic work is to reabsorb as much as possible, e.g. by transmuting (as in alchemy it the mundane into the divine, so that becomes isomorphic to God. according to Bohme, the negative side of urgrund's dialectic is experienced by humans the as evil. But like Bohme, I saw the process God-organism development (evolution) mak‐ of use of this evil to complete itself. In this evolutionary process of the divine organ iseach stage achieved by the dialectic inter‐ action is regarded by the organism as a "frozen" condition (rigid) to be overcome. Thus the Holy Spirit first makes (a stage) + then must break it (it as deterministic "given"") + flow as life to the next step. Sequence + schedule ar basic aspects.

view Xenophanes was essentially correct in his of God, except he did not see it in process t to It is working (in our world) out the answer problem: "What am I"

23 x

Nothing to do with normal memory, which by definition involves that which is past + gone.

If AD70 becomes the present, then AD 1974 becomes the future + can be changed. I - you were placed (located) in the future (vis-a-vis 1974) how ould you go about changing 1974, which is for yhou the frozen past? You would have to go back prior to 1974. But certainly not back to AD70. So the emergence (unveiling) of AD70 is not a revelation of all linear time, past present + future. It is another kind of time, a platonic archetypal eidos (sacred time) which underlies all linear time - which the latter masks + obscures.

Anamnesis has to do with recalling not where one was but where one is now, as in awakening in a strange room, being bewildered, + then "remembering" here "remember" = identifying or recognizing temporal-spacial coordinates: space-time fix. "I thought I was at fix A whereas now I 'remember' I am at Fix B," which is to say I recognize + identify Fix B. For this to occur, Fix B must be familiar on the face value, not deduced or inferred: otherwise the ambiguous term "remember" wouldn't be used. It must be a place one has been before + is now restored to. One has returned

I sense AD70 as a kind of home base, as if we all started from here, +, instead of moving through space to preach the gospel, we [also] moved through time. but his is where the news comes from: these are the events proclaimed. This disclosed world is nothing less than the topic of the good news: that Christ died + Rose, + is to return (but hasn't yet) --------------------------------------->as the St Sophia Prophet said

Perhaps even (as in "Ubik" + "Maze") II's signal is degenerating. The structure (mixture) is held together by what I called UBIK. UBIK is Form I's signal (projected presence here). "Maze," "Ubik" + "Stigmata" present the ossified II without I. (But I is alluded to in "Ubik" although it isn't available.)

Doesn't this ossification (fixation) by II (at 70AD) fit in precisely with my analysis of what's wrong with it - that it as entelechy, has failed to unfold properly? Maybe Christ came to try to heal it so it would continue on properly. But it refused his help + so "died" at that stage? My many novels + stories bear this out: not only is it not real but it is also decaying into entropy + madness.

"Ubik," then, presents the two-source world, which is why Richard mistook it for an Empedoclean Cosmology. The image which II projects is frozen, + if it wasn't for I's (UBIK) the composite universe would decay (revert) as in "Ubik." However, I, as UBIK, continually revitalizes it...but no real (linear) progress is made because all UBIK (I) can do is merely keep the composite from regressing into total disorder. The real solution is yet to come: 1) heal 2) kill or 3) eject the frozen (dead) image projected by II. Abolish II's soma along with its psyche.

The underlying substrate of our world has died, + all that the vitalistic energy VALIS can do is pour energy into this material system (as time), but the substrate cannot grow, i.e. it is dead. So the paradigm BIP (as in "Tears") just repeats itself over + over again - +, in this, the now ubiquitous Savior invisibly takes the lethal blow intented for us. UBIK can mitigate the suffering, disorder, death + sorrow but cannot abolish it until one of the 3 supra final dispositions of II is made. It is eros (represented by Aphrodite) vs Thanatos.

Last edit over 5 years ago by sekennedy62

The main quality of the BIP ground seemed to be a being stuck, in time, back at AD 70 - whereas, to the total contrary, ZEBRA could shoot back from + forth + sideways through time at will. The fusion at the two (quite opposite relationships or abilites (over created our linear time, a sort of compromise between being stuck vs leaping about at will many + all directions at any + all rates.

If time is truly the recepticle of being, then hyperuniverse II is dead, + I is very very alive Our norm lies directly between.

Again: II has a repetitious android, mechanical cycle + recycle quality - + I the free human, it is the factory (+ the products of a factory) vs the butterfly (+ the color + flight of the butterfly). It is stasis vs metamorphosis; the congealed vs the flowing. Could my cosmogony / cosmology be literally correct - 2 spinning entelechies one of which died + hence ceased to grow? Have I (in my "diploid sac" model) been informed by revelation? Something went wrong (obviously) at a very early stage; the entelecy II came out defective + had to be slain. This is more that a cosmogony / cosmology (such as "Timaeus"); this is a new religion (for this reason: the divine entity seems neither transcendent nor immanent, but consists of onehalf (precisely) of the universe - the half that evolves, + is alive. This is not pantheism this is not dualism although there is a good vs bad + a dialectic interaction. It is simply a 2 - signal source hologram, + 1 of the sources has died + "seeks" to enslave us to its repetitious, frozen prison - state, its corpse - state. Our universe is neither animate not inanimate (vs the pre-socratics + "Timaeus") half is alive + half is dead, + the alive half is trying to rescue us from enslavement to the dead part. Perhaps I is gaining ground, + it won't stay half + half; a final resolution in form of the living part will be the final outcome. Then traditional Xtian concepts are weak metaphors, only vaguely approximate!

with the strategem in which Jesus operated at the final [advent] it was certainly true then - + my model explaining why. [..] urgrund is a "secret agent" in this world, disguised, hidden, lowerly. It does not lay down the laws of this world. But, rather, modulates them, altering their outcome: melting or bending them ever so slightly - in camouglage from (i.e. it, here). My great discovery or conception of it months ago was that ZEBRA was an invader here. Camouflaging "itself", mimicking, things + [..] lesser of this world. In addition, this world is irreal., a copy of a copy, whereas ZEBRA is real (i.e this ➀). The archetype projected by the artifact is the BIP - what I had assigned to [..] Universe II. But BIP concealed by "gingerbread" accretions of linear change layers. Actually, it projects a frozen ([..] or "android") (BIP) image. It (i.e the artifact) deceived us [as] to the true nature of this world of its; however the authentic Xtians know the truth of our action in overthrowing the [..] BIP image; in this struggle they are aided by ZEBRA, who is their head. ZEBRA must be the corpus Christ; + they [..] this invisible body.

So the godhead is not just present in the lowly, by in the lowliest (of all, + for logical reasons). It is as portrayed in "Ubik" exactly. esp if you add the BIP world of "Tears." The old king breaks through from outside into the world of "Tears" exactly the way UBIK breaks through "from the other side" in "Ubik." In "Tears" the epiphany is at the all night gas station. [The] lowly and the humble, the zone of transacted business with the [truly] divine. The further up you go the farther you get from the [true] divine. This is not transcendent God (althought he, as ➀, exists there, too, nor is it immanent God: it is God as invader, carrying with him reality + the ability to see through into truth, [i.e. the] BIP, it is because of the BIP nature of the frozen image + how the God (ZEBRA) has come here. As in "Fidelio" it knocks [down] the gates from outside. Nor is it merely here helping us: it confronts the artifact face-to-face, like Leo Bolero confronting Palmer Eldritch the Lord of the enslaving delusional world. [In a] real sense, the Godhead attacks the artifact from below [..] creating it + giving it power (authority?) From above - so the ZEBRA salient here bypassing the artifact is a problem to sample + judge the artifact's world first-hand. It is a great mystery. Not solvable in our rational terms that the urgrund should create the artifact, empower + employ it in the creation of our world, + then thrust up from the bottom + confront

The moral side of balking against the artifact (BIP) is obvious, but also (another "way" or [..] is the intellectual perception of the fraudulent, the forgery, the irreal. i.e. the copy of a copy. +, at the same time, perception of the authenticity of the [..] Divine entity in contradistinction to the spurious world. There are clues to that, too. There may be a sequence here; if one balks from moral reasons, one then discerns the illusory nature of that which be balked against (cf Parmenides, vis-a-vis the reality of Form II). But when He balked, the individual did not know it is irreal. The moral aversion [..] came first.

So by the time the individual realizes (is shown) that the BIP is irreal, he has already had to go a long way toward enlightenment. Seeing it (the phenomenal world) as irreal can almost be considered a reward for the prior balkings the moral refusal.

Maybe after Christ's death, in 70 AD the urgrund slew the artifact, + thus (v. supra re hyperuniverse II) it ever since has projected a frozen image of Rome. Like the world in "Ubik" it is stuck or devolving excect the UBIK maintains + transmutes it. So the artifact's world is irreal because 1) it is a copy of a copy; + 2) the artifact is long dead. But even a counterfeit [object] has some reality.

Complete

The personality who wrote "Tears" - not me - was [..] with Acts. That explains the Acts material in "Tears" + offers more proof of multiple personalities + perhaps deliberately induced by hypnosis.

It really is a very astute piece if reasoning to conclude that if there was a retroactive time manipulation, PKD the replacement personality + Thomas the original one - not the other way around. Thomas lies underneath, with PKD laid down on the 2nd go-around. What happened re the Xerox letter is there at its source there was no retroactive time manipulation's [..] although I changed, it did not. Still, it was Thomas who had to deal with it because only Thomas anticipated it + understood what it signified - + knew what to do with it (it was not a part of PKD's life). It was connected with "Tears," as was the girl with the Golden fish coming when she did; it all revolves around the publishing of "Tears." To understand it all I must turn to "Tears." But I neither know the message (meaning) of "Tears" nor whom it was for, although I suppose it was written by Thomas.

The fight by the early Xtians, possessed by Christ as the Holy Spirit, is supratemporal - it (+ they) always are, [..] when Christ says, "Before Abraham was, I am." Then not only is the BIP Template Frozen (uncharging) but so is the God-possessed opposition to it - maybe not frozen but outside time: absolute. The whole war is trans or supra temporal as long as the template of the BIP exists, so does the original band of disciples who opposed it - they travel as eternal verities down the DNA gene pool line.

Then Thomas is the ur-personality underlying PKD, not imposed on PKD, but disinhibited (disclosed), PKD was not imposed in 1974 but was retroactively imposed back years or decades or to the Beginning. Thomas had already once lived this life, + then it was repeated - only with PKD this time; this is why I knew the exact date the XEROX

31
[Diagram: ☯Good I/Evil II → Artifact → Our Reality ← ☯Good I/Evil II]

Here is a modified, more precise model. The urgrund contains the Yang-Yin complementary bipolarities within it. It wishes to separate its opposites, + does this by projecting the artifact, the creator of our reality (world); this is YHWH. This is what Mani + the Gnostics correctly saw 1) about the nature of the creator; [..] the nature of our world. They also saw the salvific stranger God "outwitting the archons" + penetrating our "copy of a copy" world to extricate us. According to this model the Good (Form I) which we experience is a sort of invader, unable to coerce or complete the Frozen BIP template. But on the other hand, the Good (Form I) is real in a sense that Form II - which is a copy of a copy) is not. Thus we can call the template projected ceaselessly by the artifact dead or counterfeit, + Form I (ZEBRA) the authentic (Good, Form I), + thus agrees with Parmenides.

To repeat: Form I, which represents not only God or Christ or St. Sophia, is found at the outskirts or trash or bottom level of this world, as far from the imperial Omphalos of power as possible. This would adequately account for the way Jesus appeared at the First Advent. But the Second Advent (actually the remaining section of the First) will consist of a direct + successful attack on the inner fortress of imperial power itself..But, put another way, this has always already happened if we are to accept the formulation of Parmenides in denying actuality to Form II + calling it only seeming (i.e. Dokos: veil of counterfeit). There is something spurious about it, however real it may seem. It is a copy of a copy, whereas Form I is, in contrast, authentic, my set ground experience bears this out. Set was alive; ground was mere sacred

The Artifact is unaware that it is an [..] (yaltabeoth). It is the "Jealous God" of the O.T.

Furthest from the urgrund, the immutable iron prison of coertion

The artifact was slain by the urgrund in 70 AD, + transmits a Frozen signal also all real time stopped when it died so this is really 70 AD now, not AD 1978.

The yang side of the urgrund enters our "copy of a copy" universe at its lowest "trash" stratum. The true God is present at the extremities of the totality, + not at the center, where a "blackhole" tugs everything close to it into it, a template of force + coersion. The very lowest is identical (isomorphic) with the very higher in our universe we do not get nearer to God but to the dead, mechanical template projected by the artifact.

This is a cosmology consisting of two sources:

Complete
34
universe is both real + irreal simultaneously: the PTG set is real + the BIP (ground) is not ("real" standing for "alive" + "irreal "dead"). (or rather forgery rather than irreal. For "forgery" read "copy" (of a copy).

The cosmogony of the Gnostics is basically correct. But the dual nature of the universe must by perceived i.e. the penetration at the lowest stratum by the yang part of the urground. It is crucial that the yin part of the urgrund does not herself directly enter our world but is separated from it (us) by her offspring the artifact (yaldabaoth). Whereas the yang part does not create our world - as does Sophia through her progeny, the artifact - but does enter it directly. So this is why the ground is artifact-produced, + the set projected onto it by the yang (masc.) part of the urgrund (which is an androgany). Yin cannot create; she must be the receptacle. Thus the yin part of the urgrund is passing beyond her limits in creating; that is the job, correctly, of the yang part. However, the yang part does not wish to destroy his female half's creation, but, rather, to "heal" it by balancing (the forces within) it. What he will slay, or has already slain, is the artifact, so that it projects - has projected - a frozen image, for 1000s of years.

My model indicates why Parmenides believed that Form II did not really exist: it is because Form II does not enter our world directly as does Form I (+ also the projected image of Form II is static because the yang a Form I part of the urgrund has slain or may have slain the artifact).

There is no doubt that Form I really is here, + Form II really is not the mere hologramatic quality of our universe is due to this projected quality of Form II. But Form I is no illusion, no mere projection. So we can equate the irreal with evil (the BIP), as I do in my novels (esp "3 Stigmata").

Complete
40
To rule out intrinsic accomodation I would have to dismiss ZEBRA as a separate entity + revert to my earlier view of pantheism or panpsychism. I still say, it was one of my great insights that ZEBRA was an invader. + that it imitated ordinary objects + processes by replacing them with itself - a transubstantion in which the accident remained unchanged but the outcome of the causal train was directed to a different condition.

The point, too, is that when in 2-74 I abruptly [withdrew] assent from the hologram it disappeared, which is what you might expect; if I am seeking evidence that it is only a hologram this is the greatest proof possible our consensual affirmation is necessary, these two items (1): the cooking or interfering; + 2) the disappearance of it when I abruptly withdrew assent) - together they mutually ratify + confirm the view of reality as a mere hologram. Very important as the nature of the true reality it conceals, which proved to be another time + place + a very important one at that - the sole + unique moment when God in the form of Christ broke through into this world + human history. The actual clock stopped at the completion of that. There is a tight logic to this: that upon the disappearance of the hologram it would see this + not any other time + place. It is precisely the time + place of the stegenographic world of "Tears;" which had just been released - a book in which I strive not to ask, "what is real?" But finally to answer that question. 1) that I would unknowingly write about the space time of Acts; + 2) see that space-time - it all dovetails + validates my conviction that indeed this is a real as a hologram, + that 1) ZEBRA can cook it; + 2) another world always underlies the hologram: the BIP which is a frozen template: the morphose of the artifact

29) Because of its warping tug, the magnet has stopped real time in our world at about 2000 years ago. Perhaps it occludes us to this frozen temporality by projecting a delusionary world that appears contemporary. 30) Both the magnet + the brain, then, are transtemporal constants, since the moment of the brain's arrival (the time of Acts). 31) In the crucifixion, the brain as Christ sacrificed itself in order to promote new life for us, by turning itself into the distributed brain it became at the time of Acts (following the resurrection). 32) It bears some relation to our creator. This is why it cares so much about us + our enslaved condition. (For example, the magnet transmits "die messages" at us, which the brain, where necessary, overrides.) 33) In connection with these "die messages" it is part of the magnet's system of lies to declare man sinful, guilty, + deserved of punishment. The brain has the authority directly from our creator to countermand all this with joy, innocence as a verdict (acquital) + freedom. 34) The brain incorporates objects + their processes as well as humans; thus it is building an actual cosmos within a damaged cosmos.

discard. So it is unlikely that once having subsumed a cell it would later drop it out. The accretion is the negetropic process - discard would be an entropic "loosening." After all, it is moving toward flash point (critical mass) in a process of advancing pulsations. Being alive + flexible it cannot remain static -frozen- at any one growth stage. The point of its existence is this growth toward this final explosive stage, at which time it becomes pure "fire" (v. Parmenides): heat + light. The BIP's congealed quality is equated with entropy. The kind of ubiquitous sameness which the BIP imposes -by force + misinformation- is not regarded as order but a congealing. It has mistaken the two. In terms of intelligence + knowledge, it believes it has arrived at eternal truths + seeks to fix them, attacking all who disagree. (Anti-heuristic.) That datum which does not fit one of its theories must be combatted (destroyed, denied, suppressed). By this it betrayed (disclosed) itself + its true nature. Accurate info comes first -as prophecy- + then the reality it describes: "in the beginning was the word." As a blueprint preceeds a building. The evil in the universe is simply that without divine intervention the universe is running down, + there are hypostatized forces or entities -agencies- at this. It is nothing less than Form II vs Form I's override. For example the override of US history in 1974 can be seen as a breaking of an inflexible state, + the introduction of new growth: motion forward.
